eventschemas.registry.CfnAbout: Use the `AWS::EventSchemas::Registry` to specify a schema registry. Schema registries are containers for Schemas. Registries collect and organize schemas so that your schemas are in logical groups.

eventschemas.registry.Description.Description: A description of the registry to be created.

eventschemas.registry.RegistryName.Description: The name of the schema registry.

eventschemas.registry.Tags.Description: Tags to associate with the registry.
